text: Hello. Hey, how you doing? It's Jennifer going from Walness Direct. Thanks for picking up. Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day, no fingerprints. To see if you qualify for this, do you have Medicare Part A and B? You have visitors from Uranus? Sorry about that, I missed what you said. Just need a quick yes or no. Do you have Medicare Part A and B? Do you have visitors in Uranus?
